property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Apache NetBeans\jdk in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\180\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\php-8.5.2-Win32-vs17-x64;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Student\.dotnet	ools;C:\Users\Student\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Program Files (x86)\MongoDB Atlas CLI\;.

testcase.name: testCheckUserName_correctUsername_returnsTrue
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:87) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:53) at com.mycompany.registrationandlogin1.RegistrationTest.testCheckUserName_correctUsername_returnsTrue(RegistrationTest.java:97) at testcase.name: testRegisterUser_correctPassword_returnsSuccessMessage

failure.message: expected:<Username [successfully captured. Password successfully captured. Cell number successfully captured. Registration successful!]> but was:<Username [is not correctly formatted; please ensure that your username contains an underscore and is no more than five characters in length. Password is not correctly formatted; please ensure that the password contains at least eight characters, a capital letter, a number, and a special character. Cell number successfully captured.]>

testcase.failure: org.junit.ComparisonFailure: expected:<Username [successfully captured. Password successfully captured. Cell number successfully captured. Registration successful!]> but was:<Username [is not correctly formatted; please ensure that your username contains an underscore and is no more than five characters in length. Password is not correctly formatted; please ensure that the password contains at least eight characters, a capital letter, a number, and a special character. Cell number successfully captured.]> at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:117) at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:146) at testcase.name: testRegisterUser_incorrectPassword_returnsPasswordError

failure.message: expected:<[Password is not correctly formatted; please ensure that the password contains at least eight characters, a capital letter, a number, and a special character].> but was:<[Username is not correctly formatted; please ensure that your username contains an underscore and is no more than five characters in length. Password is not correctly formatted; please ensure that the password contains at least eight characters, a capital letter, a number, and a special character. Cell number successfully captured].>

testcase.failure: org.junit.ComparisonFailure: expected:<[Password is not correctly formatted; please ensure that the password contains at least eight characters, a capital letter, a number, and a special character].> but was:<[Username is not correctly formatted; please ensure that your username contains an underscore and is no more than five characters in length. Password is not correctly formatted; please ensure that the password contains at least eight characters, a capital letter, a number, and a special character. Cell number successfully captured].> at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:117) at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:146) at testcase.name: testRegisterUser_correctUsername_returnsSuccessMessage

failure.message: expected:<Username [successfully captured. Password successfully captured. Cell number successfully captured. Registration successful!]> but was:<Username [is not correctly formatted; please ensure that your username contains an underscore and is no more than five characters in length. Password is not correctly formatted; please ensure that the password contains at least eight characters, a capital letter, a number, and a special character. Cell number successfully captured.]>
